message:
refactor(main): streamline CLI entry point and update dependencies

Refresh Cargo.lock with updated dependency tree, bump crate metadata in
Cargo.toml, and refactor src/main.rs to simplify argument handling and
reduce boilerplate in the CLI entry point.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4050,6 +4050,8 @@ version = "0.42.0"

 dependencies = [
+ "either",
+ "flate2",
  "hyper",
  "indicatif 0.17.11",
